Workflow.name: Ascension-Workflow-Persona-Joiner-Process

Variable.name: event
Variable.Description: The IdentityChangeEvent. It can be used to build the provisioning plan, but does not need to be persisted with the case, so marked as transient.

Variable.name: trace
Variable.Description: Used for debugging this workflow and when set to true trace will be sent to stdout.

Variable.name: flow
Variable.Description: The name of the LCM flow that launched this workflow.

Variable.name: source
Variable.Description: String version of sailpoint.object.Source to indicate where the request originated. Defaults to LCE.

Variable.name: identityDisplayName
Variable.Description: The displayName of the identity being updated.Query for this using a projection query and fall back to the name.

Variable.name: identityModel
Variable.Description: The custom model that is used to house and pass application data.

Variable.name: emailArgList
Variable.Description: List of hash maps of all necessary emails that need to be sent out.

Workflow.Description: This is the Workflow for the Joiner Process.

Transition.to: Search Existing Parent Persona for exact match

Step.name: Search Existing Parent Persona for exact match

Transition.to: Identity Persona Decision - Matched to Existing Identity
Identity Persona Decision - Net New Identity

Step.name: Identity Persona Decision - Matched to Existing Identity
Identity Persona Decision - Net New Identity
